---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for RESURGO
title: 'feat: <short description>'
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve. -->
<!-- Example: "I'm frustrated when I have to manually reorder all my habits after adding a new one." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you tried any workarounds or alternative approaches? -->

## Who Would Benefit

<!-- Describe the user persona or use-case this would help. -->
<!-- Example: "Users who manage more than 10 habits and want to group them by life area." -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, screenshots, links to similar features in other apps, etc. -->
